response.justification: Strong software engineer with 20 years of experience and solid fundamentals, but lacks the AI-specific strategic expertise required for a director-level Principal Engineer role. Missing demonstrated AI products or platforms, advanced degree in AI, and no evidence of strategic customer advisory or recognized expertise in AI strategy—only recent operational AI infrastructure work. The role requires director-level strategic influence in AI, which this resume does not demonstrate.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeds the 15-year requirement with proven depth across multiple domains and languages
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI infrastructure work with MCP code generators and agentic workflows, showing practical exposure to emerging AI tooling
Demonstrated ability to innovate and lead technically, evidenced by founding GISCollective, mentoring through workshops and Refactoring Dojos, and working as Staff-level engineer
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field despite being a stated preference for this strategic role
No demonstrated products or platforms built with AI—current AI work appears to be technical infrastructure rather than strategic platform or product development
No evidence of director-level strategic thinking, customer advisory experience, or recognized expertise in AI strategy and adoption
